meta.title: Flexible Online MBA in Data Science with 100% Job Assistance
meta.description: Master data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence with Teksversity’s online MBA in Data Science, designed for future data-driven leaders

mainEntity.name: What is an MBA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: An MBA in Data Science is a postgraduate program that blends business management skills with data analytics, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and big data technologies. It equips students to take on leadership roles where data-driven decisions and strategic insights drive business growth.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of an MBA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: The MBA in Data Science is a 2-year postgraduate program, structured into 4 semesters. Each semester blends management concepts, data science technologies, hands-on projects, and real-world case studies to provide both theoretical knowledge and practical experience.

mainEntity.name: Who should pursue an MBA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: This program is ideal for graduates, working professionals, managers, analysts, and engineers who want to build careers in data-driven business roles, analytics, AI-focused management, or digital transformation leadership. It is also suitable for those looking to enhance their strategic decision-making skills using data insights.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are covered in the MBA in Data Science syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: The MBA in Data Science syllabus includes a comprehensive mix of technical and management subjects, such as data analytics, machine learning, AI, Python/R programming, big data technologies, SQL, business intelligence, cloud computing, statistics, and AI-driven business strategy. Students also gain practical experience through capstone projects and industry internships, ensuring readiness for real-world challenges.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after an MBA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: After completing an MBA in Data Science, graduates can pursue high-demand roles such as Data Scientist, Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Manager, AI Consultant, Machine Learning Engineer, Analytics Manager, and Data Strategy Lead. These opportunities exist across diverse industries including IT, finance, healthcare, e-commerce, consulting, retail, and technology startups, enabling a wide range of career paths.

mainEntity.name: What are the salary expectations after completing an MBA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fresh graduates of an MBA in Data Science can expect a starting salary of ₹6–10 LPA. With experience, advanced skills, and specialization in areas like machine learning, AI, or analytics management, professionals can earn ₹15–30+ LPA, depending on the role, company, and industry.

mainEntity.name: Which industries hire MBA in Data Science graduates?

acceptedAnswer.text: MBA in Data Science graduates are in demand across a wide range of industries, including IT, finance, healthcare, e-commerce, consulting, retail, manufacturing, and technology startups. Organizations in these sectors rely on data-driven decision-making, analytics, and AI strategies, creating numerous opportunities for skilled professionals.

mainEntity.name: How is an MBA in Data Science different from an MSc in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: An MBA in Data Science emphasizes business strategy, leadership, and data-driven decision-making, preparing graduates for management and leadership roles. In contrast, an MSc in Data Science is research and technically oriented, focusing on advanced algorithms, programming, and in-depth data science techniques, making it ideal for technical or research-focused careers.

mainEntity.name: Is an MBA in Data Science suitable for working professionals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The MBA in Data Science is designed for working professionals, offering flexible formats such as part-time, weekend, online, and executive programs. This allows professionals to upskill and gain advanced data science and management knowledge without disrupting their current careers.

In our MBA in Data Science program, we provide comprehensive placement support including campus drives, mock interviews, resume building, mentorship, and industry tie-ups. Students also gain opportunities for internships and live projects, ensuring they are well-prepared for roles in top IT, finance, healthcare, and analytics companies.

content.value: at Teksversity equips learners with advanced knowledge in analytics, machine learning models, and business intelligence frameworks. This master’s program helps professionals translate data into strategic insights, automate processes, and enhance organizational performance. Through real-time case studies, hands-on projects, and tool-based training, students gain practical expertise in data engineering, statistical modelling, and visualization. The MBA in Data Science for working professionals offers flexible online learning for individuals looking to upgrade their career without career interruption.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
